library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Create Dataset
set.seed(42)
n <- 100

student_data <- data.frame(
  StudentID = 1:n,
  StudyHours = rnorm(n, mean = 5, sd = 2),
  Attendance = runif(n, min = 60, max = 100),
  Major = sample(c("CSE", "ECE", "ME", "MBA"), n, replace = TRUE)
)

# Calculate CGPA with correlation logic
student_data$CGPA <- 0.4 * student_data$StudyHours +
                     0.05 * student_data$Attendance +
                     rnorm(n, sd = 0.5)

student_data$CGPA <- pmin(pmax(student_data$CGPA, 0), 10)

# Visualization 1: Scatter Plot
ggplot(student_data, aes(x = StudyHours, y = CGPA, color = Major)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal()
